trades.reasoning: RSI 62.5 sits safely in the bullish zone with all five signals confirmed (MACD crossover, rising histogram, price above SMA-20, volume surge), indicating genuine institutional buying.
Full five-signal confirmation matches the high-conviction checklist, though RSI 69.9 is near overbought so sized as medium conviction.

decisions.briefing: Market data was unavailable today with NASDAQ and S&P both flat, so we avoided reading too much into the macro tape. Two stock-specific setups (KRMN, CIGI) cleared every technical box on the checklist, so we deployed part of the idle cash into them while holding the rest in reserve until a clearer market signal emerges.

market_education.summary_en: No reliable market-moving headlines were available today, and index-level data for NASDAQ and S&P 500 came back flat, making it a genuinely quiet session at the macro level. Today's trade decisions were driven entirely by stock-specific technical signals rather than broad market direction. This is a reminder that individual stock momentum can diverge from the overall index even on data-light days.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日未能取得可靠的市場消息來源，納斯達克及標普500指數數據亦顯示持平，屬於宏觀層面相對平靜的一日。今日的交易決定完全基於個股的技術指標訊號，而非大盤走勢。這提醒我們，即使在缺乏市場數據的日子，個別股票的動能仍可能與大盤表現脫節。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Signal confirmation means only acting on a trade idea when multiple independent indicators — like RSI, MACD, moving averages, and volume — all point the same direction at once. A single bullish indicator can be noise, but five aligning together is much stronger evidence of real buying interest.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 訊號確認是指只有在多個獨立指標（如RSI、MACD、移動平均線及成交量）同時指向同一方向時，才採取交易行動。單一看漲指標可能只是雜訊，但五個指標同時吻合，則更能證明市場存在真實的買盤興趣。
